prompt: Create a luminous vertical anime-style close-up portrait of a delicate young woman with silvery white blonde short, messy, wind-tousled bob hair, pale porcelain skin, and striking bright sapphire blue eyes with long lashes. She is turned in a three-quarter pose looking slightly upward toward the viewer, lips softly parted, with a dreamy innocent expression. Her face is decorated with intricate botanical face paint: exactly 2 large orange flowers across the forehead and temple, exactly 3 vivid blue flowers on the cheek and near the eye, plus fine green stems, golden speckles, small leaves, and tiny branch-like floral details extending from the forehead down the cheek. She wears a soft white vintage blouse or dress with lace trim at the high collar and shoulders, semi-translucent fabric, and delicate embroidered lace details. The background is an ethereal blue sky garden scene with strong warm sunlight from the upper right creating glowing rim light through her hair, soft bokeh, floating petals, and golden flower stems around the frame. Include exactly 4 prominent foreground flower clusters: one yellow cluster at bottom left, one blue-and-yellow cluster at bottom right, one thin golden stem on the left edge, and one tall golden stem on the right edge. Use highly detailed painterly digital art, cinematic backlighting, soft bloom, shallow depth of field, vibrant blue-and-gold color contrast, elegant fantasy beauty, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptEn: Create a luminous vertical anime-style close-up portrait of a delicate young woman with silvery white blonde short, messy, wind-tousled bob hair, pale porcelain skin, and striking bright sapphire blue eyes with long lashes. She is turned in a three-quarter pose looking slightly upward toward the viewer, lips softly parted, with a dreamy innocent expression. Her face is decorated with intricate botanical face paint: exactly 2 large orange flowers across the forehead and temple, exactly 3 vivid blue flowers on the cheek and near the eye, plus fine green stems, golden speckles, small leaves, and tiny branch-like floral details extending from the forehead down the cheek. She wears a soft white vintage blouse or dress with lace trim at the high collar and shoulders, semi-translucent fabric, and delicate embroidered lace details. The background is an ethereal blue sky garden scene with strong warm sunlight from the upper right creating glowing rim light through her hair, soft bokeh, floating petals, and golden flower stems around the frame. Include exactly 4 prominent foreground flower clusters: one yellow cluster at bottom left, one blue-and-yellow cluster at bottom right, one thin golden stem on the left edge, and one tall golden stem on the right edge. Use highly detailed painterly digital art, cinematic backlighting, soft bloom, shallow depth of field, vibrant blue-and-gold color contrast, elegant fantasy beauty, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptZh: 创作一张发光的竖版动漫风格特写肖像，主角是一位精致的年轻女性，留着 银白金色 的短款凌乱风吹波波头，拥有白皙如瓷的皮肤，以及迷人的 明亮的蓝宝石色 双眸和长睫毛。她以四分之三侧身姿态面向观众，视线微仰，双唇微启，表情天真梦幻。她的面部装饰着精致的植物面部彩绘：前额和太阳穴处绘有 2 朵硕大的橙色花朵，脸颊和眼周绘有 3 朵鲜艳的蓝色花朵，并配有细致的绿色茎秆、金色斑点、小叶片以及从前额延伸至脸颊的细小树枝状花卉细节。她身穿一件柔软的 白色 复古衬衫或连衣裙，高领和肩部带有蕾丝饰边，面料呈半透明质感，并饰有精致的刺绣蕾丝细节。背景为飘逸的蓝色天空花园场景，右上方的强烈暖阳穿过她的发丝形成发光的轮廓光，伴有柔和的焦外成像、漂浮的花瓣以及环绕画面的金色花茎。画面前景包含 4 簇显眼的花丛：左下角一簇黄色花丛，右下角一簇蓝黄相间的花丛，左边缘一根纤细的金色花茎，以及右边缘一根高挑的金色花茎。采用高细节的数字绘画风格，电影级逆光效果，柔光渲染，浅景深，鲜明的蓝金色彩对比，优雅的奇幻美感，无文字，无水印，无额外角色。
